title: Residents survey | Laura Trott MP
meta_description: Shoreham is one of the most beautiful villages in the whole of Kent.
headings: h3: Laura Trott MP for Sevenoaks
text_excerpt: Residents survey | Laura Trott MP Skip to main content Main navigation About Laura Local Plan In Parliament Contact News Residents survey Residents survey Tweet Shoreham is one of the most beautiful villages in the whole of Kent. I love spending time here, whether it’s meeting the brilliant teachers and pupils at Shoreham Primary School, walking along the Darent Valley path, visiting Castle Farm or eating and drinking at either the Samuel Palmer, or Mount Vineyard. It is such a precious location and one that I will always stand up for to ensure it remains a great place to live. I know from previous survey’s how much you all care – like me - about protecting our much-loved Green Belt land, improving local rail and bus services and addressing the speeding through the village. But I always want to keep up to date on the things that you are worried about or want changed, so with that in mind I’ve enclosed a short survey so that I can hear from you directly. I look forward to hearing from you. Shoreham Residents Survey Current Your local priorities Leave this field blank 1. What are the three biggest issues facing Shoreham right now? 2. How would you rate the following issues locally? Questions No problem Minor problem Serious problem Roads (potholes) No problem Minor problem Serious problem Public Transport No problem Minor problem Serious problem Access to GP/ dentist No problem Minor problem Serious problem School places/ facilities No problem Minor problem Serious problem Crime and anti-social behaviour No problem Minor problem Serious problem Broadband and mobile signal No problem Minor problem Serious problem Housing, planning and protection green spaces No problem Minor problem Serious problem Other No problem Minor problem Serious problem 3. If one thing could be fixed over the next year locally, what would it be? 4. Is there anything I can do to help you personally? 5. Are there any specific local projects you would like me to champion or visit? 6. Name 7. Postcode 8. Email 9. How long have you lived in Shoreham? Under 2 years 2-5 years 5-10 years 10+ years Other… Enter other… 10. Which age group are you in? Under 18 18-30 31-50 51-70 70+ Other… Enter other… 11.
